name: Jason Yates
subject: Why Abortion Wasn’t a Hot Topic in the Democratic Debates
body:
| | The Left has shown the power of coalescing around a common goal.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvODJiPBIeqcKjko39E7ph74AWRRZwxGgI3KmWypxow2fx6VsTQ7nY9nv7garYFSBmxLLcQFXZ9lwXTYl4H3AuBV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01_2&n=1)
| Twenty candidates sparred over the economy, immigration, healthcare, and racism during the 2-night Democratic debate. Candidates vied to highlight their differences in approaches and establish why they are uniquely positioned to beat President Trump. On the first night, Julian Castro tried to take down Beto O’Rourke. The second night was livelier with Kamala Harris targeting former Vice President Joe Biden and Marianne Williamson trying to shoot down everyone’s plans with the power of love. Through the clamor of candidates talking over one another, Kamala Harris unified the crowd when she said, “America does not want to witness a food fight. They want to know how we’re going to put food on their table.” **But there’s one issue they don’t fight over – abortion. Yet, it was barely mentioned in either debate night.** This is for one simple reason — there’s nary a shadow of difference between the candidates’ positions. As evidenced by Planned Parenthood’s Action Fund Forum last Saturday, the Democratic candidates are in lockstep. Planned Parenthood’s party in South Carolina one week ago saw 20 Democratic presidential candidates show up. One after the other they lined up to kiss Planned Parenthood’s blood-soaked ring and promised to do its bidding. After all, the abortion provider will lavish millions upon millions of dollars in campaign contributions on the eventual nominee. This dog and pony show reveals just how powerful Planned Parenthood has become. With an unparalleled influence, it controls the Left’s abortion narrative and agenda. For example, every one of the 20 Democratic presidential candidates who took the stage at Planned Parenthood’s Action Fund Forum swore allegiance to protecting a woman’s “right” to terminate her baby’s life in the womb. Overall, the candidates fell in line behind three main goals. _Every one of the 20 Democratic presidential candidates who took the stage at Planned Parenthood’s Action Fund Forum swore allegiance to protecting a woman’s “right” to terminate her baby’s life in the womb._ First, repeal the Hyde Amendment, which prohibits federal money being used to pay for abortions. Dumping the Hyde Amendment will make sure Planned Parenthood stays fully funded, sending hundreds of millions of taxpayer dollars into its coffers. New York City Mayor Bill DeBlasio was blunt: “Can we just be clear? If you’re a Democrat, you’re against the Hyde amendment. Period. Period.” Joe Biden recently came under fire for flip-flopping on his stance on the Hyde Amendment, but he again cowered on stage before Planned Parenthood and the Left and made plain he no longer supports it. He knows that if he becomes the nominee, he’ll never have their full support — or their money — without aligning with their dictates. That’s why he now promises to champion “sexual and reproductive healthcare” by eliminating the Hyde Amendment and reversing all the changes put into place by the Trump administration. Which brings us to goal number two: eliminate the Trump administration’s so-called [Title X gag rule](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=hqIUUz4sLAAW8OVcZ9VaNvhKSHT-9xe8Ebzo-ANwk4qoNK4f-gh_Bs117LKKExNQQYBfubIOGXfu5jVAuFtD7Ipptg8-mwkhHnrcMJi3K7deQt0xoLebG7jskeHDXUFbyqHX6-A9hXcVSU6CQrSu6cscAiQDKPrcFRe-XNPVW3c&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01_2&n=2). Simply put, this “gag rule” forbids federal funding for programs where abortion is a method of planning, forbids doctors and family planning professionals from providing patients with pro-abortion materials, protects the religious liberties of doctors, nurses and other professionals who disagree with abortion on moral grounds, and requires physical and financial separation between where family planning advice is dispensed and where abortions are performed . Gov. Hickenlooper told the crowd he would personally oversee a “magnificent expansion” of Title X funding for family planning, meaning funding abortions nationwide. Third, Democrats would move to codify Roe v. Wade. Some candidates promised to use the federal government’s power to keep states from protecting life. Mayor Pete Buttigieg would outright block states from implementing their own restrictions on abortion. California Sen. Kamala Harris promised to create a federal system of “preclearance” that would mandate that any new state-level abortion restrictions be subject to federal review by the Department of Justice before being allowed to take effect. Elizabeth Warren declared, “It’s time to go on offense with Roe v. Wade.” Her cavalier comments reflect the months-long push by Democrats in states like New York, Vermont, Massachusetts, Virginia, New Mexico, Rhode Island, and Washington to pass legislation expanding abortion access, some even allowing abortion up to birth! Several have been successful, but thank God some haven’t. All of this goes to show the days of Democratic support for policies that make abortion “safe, legal and rare” are long gone. The new mantra for Planned Parenthood and abortion-supporting Democrats is the outrageous hashtag #ShoutYourAbortion. The health of the unborn is being ignored in favor of what they call “sexual and reproductive health.” Planned Parenthood [claims](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pvBn7Lwi4g_HW95cSa62uunlBcUq-9lT0Oso5ESzstxAWymbQ8pi3mzLDpKAXuZki6jZS7bMGltC_m63BVh4RZm39oRtZLaeFWj-Jotp6pD4tY6kpGsAFT5CpDOGkjqXMn3zwq3Nr_j4tOAuwu1hC0_6HrMi6-BaAKvTNctwwzg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01_2&n=3) that “because of systemic inequities, many patients who rely on Title X for their health care needs are people of color, LGBTQ people, and people in rural areas — all of whom already face significant barriers to accessing health care.” This claim tries to turn the argument into one about race, sexual orientation, income equality, and geography but distracts from the issue at hand — the life of an unborn human baby. The Left has shown the power of coalescing around a common goal. Pro-life Americans must follow that example and rally around our shared conviction that the rights of the unborn are universal human rights. More than ever we must unify to make social and political change for the sake of those who cannot yet speak for themselves. Abortion will be a — maybe _THE_ — defining issue of the 2020 presidential election. For every American who values life, the time is now to stand together and oppose Planned Parenthood and any political candidate who pays fealty to its anti-life agenda. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01_2&n=4)
* * *
[Support My Faith Votes with your tax deductible donation.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66idsHszZ_cNjdrkrk6Ct22R5LqpO-pYuvVIOOj4RsxM_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01_2&n=5) _My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement that motivates, equips and activates Christians in America to vote in every election, transforming our communities and influencing our nation with biblical truth. By partnering with national faith leaders, My Faith Votes provides resources to help Christians Pray, Think, and Act to create an America where God is honored in the public square._
---

To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01_2&n=6).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01_2&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01_2&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01_2&n=9)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A toss-up in Kentucky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | I didn't expect to be writing you about a toss-up election in Kentucky, but Derek, Virginia isn't the only Commonwealth in the country that can experience a political turnaround.

**Virginia also isn't the only Commonwealth where there are huge elections this year. While we're working towards securing a Democratic majority here at home, Kentucky has the chance to replace an extreme Republican governor with a strong Democrat, Andy Beshear.**

In the primary election earlier this year, Democratic Attorney General Beshear earned 13,000 more votes than the incumbent governor, Republican Matt Bevin. That tells me something big: Andy's really got a shot at winning in November. But he could use our help if he's going to make it happen. [**Will you join me in stepping up to support Andy Beshear today?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177e/3e0906/7b5730d9/3e309825/966026345/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-beshear?source=20190628_1_FR_TK_Beshear&amount=30&20190628_1_FR_TK_Beshear&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+me+in+stepping+up+to+suppo&utm_campaign=20190628_1_FR_TK_Beshear")

As Attorney General, Andy has taken on the opioid crisis, fought for Kentuckians with pre-existing conditions, and supported public employees at every turn. He's ready to focus on the positive change that strong leaders can bring about for Kentucky families, like funding public education and creating good-paying jobs.

Midnight on Sunday marks a major monthly deadline for Andy's campaign. It's critical that Andy reports strong fundraising numbers -- especially since the incumbent governor has self-funded his campaigns in the past. He doesn't rely on grassroots support from people like you, _but Andy does_. **Please chip in whatever you can to support Democrat Andy Beshear's campaign for Governor of Kentucky:** [**DONATE $25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177e/3e0906/7b5730d9/3e309824/966026345/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-beshear?source=20190628_1_FR_TK_Beshear&amount=25&20190628_1_FR_TK_Beshear&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=20190628_1_FR_TK_Beshear")

clean_body: | | I didn't expect to be writing you about a toss-up election in Kentucky, but Derek, Virginia isn't the only Commonwealth in the country that can experience a political turnaround. Virginia also isn't the only Commonwealth where there are huge elections this year. While we're working towards securing a Democratic majority here at home, Kentucky has the chance to replace an extreme Republican governor with a strong Democrat, Andy Beshear. In the primary election earlier this year, Democratic Attorney General Beshear earned 13,000 more votes than the incumbent governor, Republican Matt Bevin. That tells me something big: Andy's really got a shot at winning in November. But he could use our help if he's going to make it happen. "" As Attorney General, Andy has taken on the opioid crisis, fought for Kentuckians with pre-existing conditions, and supported public employees at every turn. He's ready to focus on the positive change that strong leaders can bring about for Kentucky families, like funding public education and creating good-paying jobs. Midnight on Sunday marks a major monthly deadline for Andy's campaign. It's critical that Andy reports strong fundraising numbers -- especially since the incumbent governor has self-funded his campaigns in the past. He doesn't rely on grassroots support from people like you, but Andy does. Please chip in whatever you can to support Democrat Andy Beshear's campaign for Governor of Kentucky: "" "" "" "" I know firsthand that being Governor isn't about left or right, it's about right and wrong -- and Andy knows that, too. That's why I'm proud to support him in this important 2019 election. I hope you'll join me! -Tim Kaine | **** ""** | "" "" ""

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7887377/75281009/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzg4MmE4MS03NDlhLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bc9L8ysmbauAaYYcjUor801gM9y1-X8n4_nF3EU6Tqs=)
---
Team Siegel here! Wanted to make sure you saw this great national coverage we got.
* * *
Peter, Big news — our race is receiving national attention! Today, the Intercept published an article that highlights the amazing movement we created last election:

“In Texas’ 10th district, Mike Siegel ran an aggressive race against Michael McCaul, the Republican currently serving in Tom DeLay’s former seat. The national party didn’t have the race on its radar, but Siegel, who put together a strong grassroots network and ran as an outspoken progressive, gave McCaul a scare, losing by a margin of 4 percentage points."

**[Let's keep the momentum going! Can you chip in $10, $20, or $50 so we can finish off the quarter strong and hit our $25,000 goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7887378/75281010/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzg4MmE4MS03NDlhLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bc9L8ysmbauAaYYcjUor801gM9y1-X8n4_nF3EU6Tqs=&refcode=em062919-1)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7887379/75281011/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzg4MmE4MS03NDlhLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bc9L8ysmbauAaYYcjUor801gM9y1-X8n4_nF3EU6Tqs=&refcode=em062919-1) We know you can’t beat McCaul by outspending him, only by outworking him. As the Intercept quotes our campaign as saying, “In 2018, we stepped up and ran our campaign the right way in a district that the state and national party had left for dead. We campaigned in all nine counties, had 1,000 volunteers. We put this district in play. We made up 15 percentage points against an incumbent considered to be unbeatable. We put this in play. Running a top-down campaign attempting to buy a district is what McCaul did, that’s not what we need here.” We’ve built a team of 1,000 volunteers, and over 1,000 donors, too. We are so close to winning this district, but only if we keep the incredible momentum we’ve generated going. [**We have a big $25,000 goal to hit before Sunday at midnight. clean_body: = Team Siegel here! Wanted to make sure you saw this great national coverage we got. Peter, Big news — our race is receiving national attention! Today, the Intercept published an article that highlights the amazing movement we created last election: “In Texas’ 10th district, Mike Siegel ran an aggressive race against Michael McCaul, the Republican currently serving in Tom DeLay’s former seat. The national party didn’t have the race on its radar, but Siegel, who put together a strong grassroots network and ran as an outspoken progressive, gave McCaul a scare, losing by a margin of 4 percentage points." We know you can’t beat McCaul by outspending him, only by outworking him. As the Intercept quotes our campaign as saying, “In 2018, we stepped up and ran our campaign the right way in a district that the state and national party had left for dead. We campaigned in all nine counties, had 1,000 volunteers. We put this district in play. We made up 15 percentage points against an incumbent considered to be unbeatable. We put this in play. Running a top-down campaign attempting to buy a district is what McCaul did, that’s not what we need here.” We’ve built a team of 1,000 volunteers, and over 1,000 donors, too. We are so close to winning this district, but only if we keep the incredible momentum we’ve generated going. It will take every donor we can get to counter McCaul’s corporate machine. Hard-working people don’t usually have thousands to spend on political donations, but thousands of hard-working people giving what they can are a greater force than any corporate PAC could ever hope Chip in $5 and help us show our grassroots strength!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7889123/75295803/-1972795140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmM0NmI5Ny03ODlhLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2UURh2lPVOJp7k0HWoL_ELypPq2Mn9OijnabpDR8G5E=&refcode=em190629zstrategy&amounts=5,15,35,50,100,500,1000&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta2)**

name: Edana Walker, National Fundraising Director
subject: Why I’m with Teresa
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em_header&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em_header&noskip=true]
Dear Friend, I’ll make this quick.

We’re up against our first FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow night . Georgia’s next Senator will be the difference between a Democratic Senate and more of the same from Mitch McConnell, David Perdue and the GOP. Teresa can be that Senator – donate any amount right now, and let’s win Georgia and flip the Senate.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062919b&amount=5&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062919b&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062919b&amount=50&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062919b&amount=100&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062919b&amount=250&express_lane=true]
Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062919b&express_lane=true]

We know what the stakes are. The right to reproductive healthcare including abortion is under threat. The Supreme Court hangs in the balance of the Senate majority. Our institutions are widening inequality in the economy, the criminal justice system, and our nation’s schools.

David Perdue isn’t just ignoring the problems — he’s making them worse by introducing anti-choice legislation in the Senate, stalling on disaster relief for Georgia, and championing a tax cut bill that worsened our deficit in order to pay back the GOP’s corporate donors.

Taking on Perdue and the special interests backing his campaign will take all of us working together. Donate any amount before our deadline and help Teresa win Georgia. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062919b&noskip=true]

Keep on fightin’,

Edana

<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/its-down-to-the-wire/]

PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. Consider making a donation of any amount now. ( ) We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails, click here. name: Debbie
subject: Will you help Jim?
body:
|
---
This is Debbie Hood. Jim and I have been married for 24 years, and we've been blessed with our three children, Rebecca, Matthew, and Annabelle.
Hi friend,

This is Debbie Hood. Jim and I have been married for 24 years, and we've been blessed with our three children, Rebecca, Matthew, and Annabelle. Jim has been in public service for most of that time, first serving as DA and now as attorney general for the last 15 years. I've personally seen how committed he is to making Mississippi a better place for all!

That's why I know Jim will make a great governor. He and his team are running a strong campaign, but they have a big fundraising deadline tomorrow. I know your support now would make all the difference to him.

**Will you chip in to help Jim 's vision for Mississippi become a reality?**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We have to make it clear before the next big deadline on Sunday: We can run a presidential campaign where a lot of people chip in a little bit at a time to create something incredible.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'm only raising money from grassroots donors. No PAC money, no federal lobbyist money, no big checks from fancy fundraising events. You and me -- we're building this together. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e35b/45c30650/17e18384c/669d5bf9/3808461378/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
This Sunday is a big marker for our campaign -- the FEC's second quarterly fundraising deadline.

After Sunday, we'll tally up all the donations we've received since April and tell the world how many people pitched in and how much money we have to tackle the next phase of the campaign.

The total numbers will get a lot of attention, and they should. They matter.

But it's also powerfully important that we show _where_ we get our money in this fight. I'm only raising money from grassroots donors. **No PAC money, no federal lobbyist money, no big checks from fancy fundraising events. You and me -- we're building this together.

I am deeply grateful for everything you do as a member of this team. Will you chip in at this critical moment to make sure we have the strength we need to keep growing our movement?**

| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e35b/45c30650/17e18384c/669d5be5/3808461378/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYyOGVtNC1lb3EtZWMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190628em4-eoq-ec-full")
---
>
In a country where people who can write fat checks call the shots, I was very glad that our first quarterly fundraising report showed that we could do things differently. You are the backbone of our movement, and it's built with small dollar contributions.

We have to make it clear before the next big deadline on Sunday: We can run a presidential campaign where a lot of people chip in a little bit at a time to create something incredible.

We can get big money out of politics, root corruption out of Washington, and make Washington work for everyone -- not just the people who can afford to hire armies of lobbyists and lawyers, or who can write a giant check to chat up a candidate at a private fundraiser.

**That is the power of a grassroots-funded campaign, and that is my promise to you: I 'll never stop fighting to make sure _everyone_ gets a fighting chance.

[But first, we've got to hit this goal by Sunday, and that means we need to pick up the pace a bit. Will you pitch in $3 or whatever makes sense for you?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e35b/45c30650/17e18384c/669d5be5/3808461378/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWp1bjE5ZW9xIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYyOGVtNC1lb3EtZWMtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-jun19eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190628em4-eoq-ec-full")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Good afternoon, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
I'm six months into my first term in Congress, and I am proud of the work I am doing to serve my constituents - from the veterans of Culpeper to the suburban parents of Chesterfield to the farmers of Nottoway.
| | _If you don 't have time to read Abigail's message, **[please consider helping her reach her second quarter fundraising goal before tomorrow's midnight deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/vFvWvArcu5WI9iIXmTIqTsfvwKOoe57__cFlqNmwAUs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)** We have just 36 hours to raise $18,064 before she reports her numbers to the public._ | ********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/vFvWvArcu5WI9iIXmTIqTsfvwKOoe57__cFlqNmwAUs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)********
---
* * *
Good afternoon, Peter.

I'm six months into my first term in Congress, and I am proud of the work I am doing to serve my constituents - from the veterans of Culpeper to the suburban parents of Chesterfield to the farmers of Nottoway.

From the committee [hearings I led on soil health](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/ReIyn4S101-TTsmblybnC4tdFG6RYXznwjDEvPWZvAg=) and its impact on erosion, farm production, and carbon sequestration, to my [work co-leading a bicameral and bipartisan effort](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/FXCCCNCFx-ALTQh8bjSoKOPaK0SWYg4eGkpgsmv6it0=) to lower prescription drug costs to my [successful efforts securing funding for broadband internet](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/3Y3sAXQKdQZGFIqymvZpmlDgphNA6LsGPvC5hSR3Zxk=) in rural counties to [my work to protect the security of our elections and democracy](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/1NDRZt8SN3AdzZTSJPgE1Bir5obZK6_GDfuI9C2W8q8=), I am working hard for Virginians and for our country.

Thank you for keeping up with my work and taking the time to read emails like these -- especially on the weekend.

**[As we head into the end of our second fundraising quarter, I hope you'll consider supporting my re-election campaign. We're aiming to raise $18,064 by tomorrow at midnight -- can you help with a contribution? >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/vFvWvArcu5WI9iIXmTIqTsfvwKOoe57__cFlqNmwAUs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
[$10 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/vFvWvArcu5WI9iIXmTIqTsfvwKOoe57__cFlqNmwAUs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b1_as_all&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) | [$25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/vFvWvArcu5WI9iIXmTIqTsfvwKOoe57__cFlqNmwAUs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)

[$250 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/vFvWvArcu5WI9iIXmTIqTsfvwKOoe57__cFlqNmwAUs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b1_as_all&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) | [Custom »](https://act.myngp.com/el/lpzfrc2Z7ChL1NX4ZSm-N7GZN9_4ZGMBrTkCchDj19s=/vFvWvArcu5WI9iIXmTIqTsfvwKOoe57__cFlqNmwAUs=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)
Thank you for your support!

_\-- Abigail_

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: an important ask for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello there --
I have a really important ask for you before our big FEC deadline on Sunday. Let me explain:
Tomorrow at midnight -- the last day of June -- we're facing a fundraising deadline. The total we report will be made public and Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and corporate special interests will all use it as a barometer to measure our fortitude.
**New Hampshire is historically home to some of the most expensive elections so the amount we raise will say a lot about our strength (or our weakness).**
If we're going to show our strength and fend off attacks from the right, we need to raise $10,000 by Sunday. I'm asking for your help personally because you're one of our movement's most important members:
[**Will you please give $3 or however much feels right to you before tomorrow 's FEC deadline? Maggie Hassan

Let me explain: Tomorrow at midnight -- the last day of June -- we're facing a fundraising deadline. The total we report will be made public and Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and corporate special interests will all use it as a barometer to measure our fortitude. New Hampshire is historically home to some of the most expensive elections so the amount we raise will say a lot about our strength (or our weakness). If we're going to show our strength and fend off attacks from the right, we need to raise $10,000 by Sunday. subject: No regrets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is when it matters most.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-1-a&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") friend, this is the moment when it matters most.

**Believe me when I tell you: The only way we protect this Senate seat and give Democrats a shot at taking back the Senate is if you give $10 _right_ now. [Please give everything you can.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-1-a&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Tina is fighting with everything she has to protect our health care.

She's taking on Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump to stop the flow of right-wing judges into our courts.

She's the _only_ Senator who's worked at Planned Parenthood and will never back down to protect a woman's right to choose.

And she's the _only_ Senator running in back-to-back elections, forcing her resources to be stretched thin as she takes on the Trump/McConnell special interest money machine.

**She 's had our back at every step -- now we have to have hers. What you do now will be the difference between her re-election or defeat. **

**[Please give everything you can before her end-of-quarter deadline to protect Minnesota's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-1-a&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Let's not wake up with any regrets next November about how hard we could have worked or what we could have done differently.

Ryan Furlong
Campaign Manager | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-1-a-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: AG
subject: they know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Florida Action,
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3560/9e00690/6ab07783/24070ccb/858923784/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=em-header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=062919-es-eoq-1&source=062919-es-eoq-1")

I'll get right down to it. Donald Trump and his team know how important winning Florida is to being re-elected, and they're already investing a ton of money in an attempt to make that happen.

They spent almost $635,000 in digital ads in Miami, trying to lure people to his "Latinos for Trump" rally this week. Their willingness to spend more than half a million dollars to build an audience numbering only a few hundred people shows you just how important they think winning Florida is to Trump's re-election chances.

We know that Florida is the key to Trump winning in 2020, and they know it, too. But what they don't know is that I can count on committed supporters like you to help provide the resources we need to register and reengage a million voters, flip Florida blue, and defeat Trump.

**Can you help us stop Trump by making a contribution right now to help fund our registration efforts, before our critical end-of-quarter deadline tomorrow at midnight?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[Express Donate: $5](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3560/9e00690/6ab07783/24070cca/858923784/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ _[Express Donate: $10](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3560/9e00690/6ab07783/24070ccd/858923784/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiMTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ffa-eoq-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3+-+Express+Donate++ask2+&utm_campaign=062919-es-eoq-1&source=062919-es-eoq-1")_ _[Express Donate: $25](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3560/9e00690/6ab07783/24070ccc/858923784/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ffa-eoq-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=4+-+Express+Donate++ask3+&utm_campaign=062919-es-eoq-1&source=062919-es-eoq-1")_ _[Express Donate: $50](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3560/9e00690/6ab07783/24070ccf/858923784/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck5DQjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ffa-eoq-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+Express+Donate++ask4+&utm_campaign=062919-es-eoq-1&source=062919-es-eoq-1")_ _[Donate another amount.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3560/9e00690/6ab07783/24070cce/858923784/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ffa-eoq-deadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=062919-es-eoq-1&source=062919-es-eoq-1")_ Not only do they know how important Florida is to re-electing Trump, they know that we have a plan that will make it impossible for Trump to win.

They will be relentless in their attempts to stop us, and I'm counting on you to help power our registration efforts that will transform Florida in 2020 and for years to come.

The truth is that the only way they can stop us is if people sit on the sidelines, instead of stepping up when it counts to build the progressive future we deserve.

I believe in our mission, but most importantly I believe in you. Our movement can leave a lasting impact on our nation, but we can only succeed with your help.

Forward.

Andrew Gillum

The truth is that the only way they can stop us is if people sit on the sidelines, instead of stepping up when it counts to build the progressive future we deserve. I believe in our mission, but most importantly I believe in you. Our movement can leave a lasting impact on our nation, but we can only succeed with your help. Forward. name: Charlie
subject: Trans-fur-ming TX 22 into a pet friendly place
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Hi there!

I'm Charlie, the Pawlitical Director here at Team Sri. We have had a ruff couple of years dealing with all the divisiveness our country has been seeing. I like having clean water to drink, clean air to breathe when I take walks, no loud gunshots, good medical care and reproductive care when I go the vet, and of course, NO KILL SHELTERS. I wanted to let you know that if we all chip today, we can see the paw-sitive change we are hoping for and send Sri to Congress!

Sri is running to ensure that every Texan - and American - is never left behind. No matter which religion, race, gender, faith or species - he will fight for your rights. [**Please **](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qn3s638_mCxeaxXhtW_0ziv0A1j1eFlBnscYqbuPO9I=/5fPBhF16DdNaJx5CtFdLnVJj9k5c_C_9KDIhvXn6NbA=?refcode=0629email)**[throw us a bone](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qn3s638_mCxeaxXhtW_0ziv0A1j1eFlBnscYqbuPO9I=/5fPBhF16DdNaJx5CtFdLnVJj9k5c_C_9KDIhvXn6NbA=?refcode=0629email)********[ so this campaign can be up and running faster than me chasing a ball at the park!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qn3s638_mCxeaxXhtW_0ziv0A1j1eFlBnscYqbuPO9I=/5fPBhF16DdNaJx5CtFdLnVJj9k5c_C_9KDIhvXn6NbA=?refcode=0629email)**

Let's add some bite to the campaign's bark! Please donate today to help send Sri to Congress! [The deadline is this Sunday so don't wait! ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qn3s638_mCxeaxXhtW_0ziv0A1j1eFlBnscYqbuPO9I=/5fPBhF16DdNaJx5CtFdLnVJj9k5c_C_9KDIhvXn6NbA=?refcode=0629email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qn3s638_mCxeaxXhtW_0ziv0A1j1eFlBnscYqbuPO9I=/5fPBhF16DdNaJx5CtFdLnVJj9k5c_C_9KDIhvXn6NbA=?refcode=0629email)

Chipping in for a better Texas is the leash you can do!

-Charlie for Sri 2020

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qn3s638_mCxeaxXhtW_0ziv0A1j1eFlBnscYqbuPO9I=/Y4gKJpTZxYIcNzsLefx9BiKgAZzNEddlBnlLrCqyl_s=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Qn3s638_mCxeaxXhtW_0ziv0A1j1eFlBnscYqbuPO9I=/OjFTmF1mg9XyvmT45I8ubCepDnLQBdP9Hn9ssbMaa88=)

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

body:
---
| | Speaker Pelosi asked. Adam Schiff asked. Khizr Khan asked. Deb Haaland asked. Ted Lieu asked. Gabby Giffords asked. Paul Begala asked. James Carville asked. But, I wanted to ask you personally: I'm about to hit my very first end-of-quarter deadline since announcing my race for Senate. | Dear Friend,
I need a minute of your time. The first five months of our campaign have been extremely busy and productive for us. We have brought big names like war hero Congressman Dan Crenshaw and Congresswoman Liz Cheney to the district and I have had the opportunity to get my message out to thousands of constituents in NY-11. We are coming up on an extremely important mid-year campaign deadline tomorrow, June 30th, at midnight. This report is going to really show our strength. I want the media to report on our strong and thriving campaign. I really need all hands on deck here... Our mid-year fundraising goals are short just $7200 and 184 individual donors. Friend,

**Results.**

_We know this is what Hoosiers want from their leaders above all else. And during Governor Holc omb’s time in office, strong results are exactly what he has provided. _

Indiana is the fiscal envy of the nation. We are home to record job commitments, record infrastructure investments, new workforce development opportunities and a state government that is becoming leaner and more responsive to the needs of Hoosiers.
[ **Chip in by June 30th @ 11:59pm to continue our Hoosier momentum** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8f4da04ea9484d40a85260a645bbc7f6&_e=zxp7f6hutHLZNC-iIbkX5fxIOuCbaEw13j5uJfyj5zaClxAGxqoSRMjAaMdGz9A3U2SB51SpQ_blc7fT3xznW60ZZFySrXLW2YAuGj_kNDihPMw4kcMJ2a5TlKRiqo9IaAXA2ZHTSv2lsd39CHAqdQzE7hg_NUPqnNqwBLipg4vxxhOQYMDB4bkXLd22vIuDoicyyCDxc2tSYVEEzsyKivA_NSnooKJXLFx4pZp68jIPhNuRJHWiVS0DQNQlRzYrtv0ONA2iv1G1FjsFXN-76xoOrpTOahiFQIPQWLAiiCV2njRTOiGJVZ4rKQZzQEN6gTHDU1ckSSXND0OK1NzL4sKTGKtvZec3fT98RKfGxyDVeDbQ1I1-vHnoE1BDyDosQSYLmr2DrO7Evs5NZ7MWKg%3D%3D)
During the 2019 legislative session alone, Governor Holcomb delivered big results for Hoosiers as part of his Next Level Agenda. He:
* Signed Indiana’s eighth-straight balanced budget
* Increased K-12 education funding by an historic $763 million
* Accelerated the completion of major highway projects
* Connected unserved Hoosiers to broadband internet
* Doubled down on Next Level Jobs
* Improved school safety
* Attacked the infant mortality rate
* Passed Indiana’s first bias crimes law
* And so much more!

These results are resonating in the lives of folks we hear from everyday, and as Hoosiers we could not be more proud of Governor Holcomb’s work.
Looking for a way to show you’re also proud of the results Governor Holcomb is delivering Hoosiers? There’s an opportunity right now.This Sunday night, Governor Holcomb is facing a big fundraising deadline. [**June 30th marks the first official Holcomb Crew Fundraising Deadline of 2019**.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8f4da04ea9484d40a85260a645bbc7f6&_e=zxp7f6hutHLZNC-iIbkX5fxIOuCbaEw13j5uJfyj5zaClxAGxqoSRMjAaMdGz9A3U2SB51SpQ_blc7fT3xznW60ZZFySrXLW2YAuGj_kNDihPMw4kcMJ2a5TlKRiqo9IaAXA2ZHTSv2lsd39CHAqdQzE7hg_NUPqnNqwBLipg4vxxhOQYMDB4bkXLd22vIuDUEovdWUAR1Ywbh2bn1WAloBicrqc5SwrhJZrjPShj2U9uIemC-P_csr1KDsiYOJGJlN2yysCHYEwAQPgoV4iLutIT56TMLJ1V7lrLNvtMc49QHoxpQHlM8HmHkiTU8foUz7oNP1isIPwwUZY-IIKIG_6AdZ01h5XNLhTnaK5gPP2X9t-Wm1KAY4kvt7YLSFhCEct_iR-1gCiGZ0mI-hj8w%3D%3D) And you better believe the fundraising total for the period will make headlines.
If you like the results you’re seeing from Governor Holcomb, would you consider contributing to make our fundraising numbers even stronger? Hoosiers from everywhere in our state -- from Jeffersonville to Crown Point, and from Evansville to Fort Wayne -- are building a groundswell of support behind Governor Holcomb’s results.
**[Are you in? No matter the amount, your help is vital. Donate any amount by June 30th @ 11:59pm.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8f4da04ea9484d40a85260a645bbc7f6&_e=zxp7f6hutHLZNC-iIbkX5fxIOuCbaEw13j5uJfyj5zaClxAGxqoSRMjAaMdGz9A3U2SB51SpQ_blc7fT3xznW60ZZFySrXLW2YAuGj_kNDihPMw4kcMJ2a5TlKRiqo9IaAXA2ZHTSv2lsd39CHAqdQzE7hg_NUPqnNqwBLipg4vxxhOQYMDB4bkXLd22vIuDGJzgpS8XChKwvWyq4ADwFj3CYO4prjvT2ZDbrCi6E2iFz8zAkaAszNRnQGyDGyavVZtwviJgddNE4XRTdK3r2dIerpNpK2l5jAYzTO0m5C28RcJg31H2chUAcyxjX23dhh7nrYn2MNe8lket7P7QoGHyPjjyfT8dIEcJV1hBsqsYTkGnvjlhq2eRpxox4ovdVrUz3iz0h-k4_UI8gGobfQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Indiana is the fiscal envy of the nation. We are home to record job commitments, record infrastructure investments, new workforce development... | | | | ---|---|--- Friend, Results. We know this is what Hoosiers want from their leaders above all else. And during Governor Holc omb’s time in office, strong results are exactly what he has provided. Indiana is the fiscal envy of the nation. We are home to record job commitments, record infrastructure investments, new workforce development opportunities and a state government that is becoming leaner and more responsive to the needs of Hoosiers. During the 2019 legislative session alone, Governor Holcomb delivered big results for Hoosiers as part of his Next Level Agenda. He: Signed Indiana’s eighth-straight balanced budget Increased K-12 education funding by an historic $763 million Accelerated the completion of major highway projects Connected unserved Hoosiers to broadband internet Doubled down on Next Level Jobs Improved school safety Attacked the infant mortality rate Passed Indiana’s first bias crimes law And so much more! These results are resonating in the lives of folks we hear from everyday, and as Hoosiers we could not be more proud of Governor Holcomb’s work. Looking for a way to show you’re also proud of the results Governor Holcomb is delivering Hoosiers? There’s an opportunity right now.This Sunday night, Governor Holcomb is facing a big fundraising deadline. And you better believe the fundraising total for the period will make headlines. If you like the results you’re seeing from Governor Holcomb, would you consider contributing to make our fundraising numbers even stronger? Hoosiers from everywhere in our state -- from Jeffersonville to Crown Point, and from Evansville to Fort Wayne -- are building a groundswell of support behind Governor Holcomb’s results. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.** Thank you, Team Holcomb Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000 annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs and political committees are unlimited. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Against all odds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

As a Senator from Colorado -- a purple state -- I've never known an easy election.

Only 3% of Coloradans knew me when I started my first Senate campaign. Against impossible odds, I went on to beat a Tea Party Republican in a terrible year for Democrats.

Six years later, I did it again.

The pundits considered us a long shot then -- and they're saying the same thing now. We proved them wrong before, and we'll do it again.

The first FEC fundraising deadline is Sunday at midnight. This will be the next test of our strength as a campaign. It's so important that a group of grassroots donors have offered to match every donation before the deadline.

[**So that 's why I'm asking, Team, will you step up now and rush a matched donation? Any amount you can give -- $3, $5, or even $25 -- will double your impact to fuel this campaign >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadff/134673f2/17d7590/6996b8d5/492499581/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Proud of Florida!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Earlier this month Governor DeSantis signed a bill to ban sanctuary cities in Florida. As a fellow Floridian, this is great news for our state, the illegal immigration crisis, and securing and protecting our borders. If only we could see this ban implemented nationwide...
---

| Let's send a message to the rest of the country that sanctuary cities will not be tolerated. If we are going to begin to secure and protect our borders as well as solve the illegal immigration problem, we have to ban sanctuary cities and not allow the illegal immigrants in this country to get a free pass.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I wanted to share this breaking news with you --
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I have some really incredible news to share with you: **in the 24 hours after I set foot on the debate stage Thursday night, this grassroots team raised more than $2 million online**. These donations came from 63,277 people -- 36,861 of whom pitched in for the very first time. Their average contribution was just $30. It was the best day of online fundraising yet, but more importantly, this is what a true campaign _For The People_ looks like. **But we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas -- not for one second.** It’s likely that we will be out-raised by some of our opponents in this crowded primary -- some of whom have run for president before or entered this race with massive war chests of campaign funds. And we already know that Donald Trump and his allies have amassed well over $100 million for his re-election campaign. Whoever wins this Democratic primary and faces off against Trump in 2020 needs to be ready for an onslaught of attacks. So we need a candidate who can break through the noise, take on Donald Trump, and defeat him at the ballot box. I’m ready to be that fighter. I know a rap sheet when I see one -- and I’m ready to prosecute the case against four more years of this Administration. But I won’t be able to win without your support. **If you’re able, can you add a donation of whatever amount is meaningful and affordable to you before the FEC deadline? Help us seize the momentum of this moment and reach out to millions more undecided voters across this country:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190629-eoq?refcode=ema190629-22-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=5475_5755789_GF289i&akid=5475%2E5755789%2EGF289i)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"Democratic leaders in the U.S. House of Representatives backed down to President Donald Trump..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=839c4d8d00&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [In Victory for Trump, U.S. House Democrats Back Down on Border Aid Bill Demands](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f61f242f5c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Reuters_
“Democratic leaders in the U.S. House of Representatives backed down to President Donald Trump and passed a $4.6 billion aid package to address a migrant surge at the U.S.-Mexico border,” Susan Cornwell reports. “Trump, the Republican-controlled Senate and moderate Democrats insisted on finishing the emergency aid bill as soon as possible, without further haggling.”

President Trump [welcomed](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4dfd21517d&e=3ee4985eea) the bill’s passage on Twitter. “Bipartisan Humanitarian Aid Bill for the Southern Border just passed. A great job done by all!”
---
|
---
| [President Trump's Middle East Plan is a Refreshing Change](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=136385ab7c&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNN
“The Trump administration is no less committed to peace than its predecessors. The key difference is that Trump does not feel tied down by the unsuccessful formulas of the past, and he and his team are willing to openly challenge that conventional thinking,” Jon Lerner writes. “The goal of the Trump plan is to end this decades-long conflict and create conditions for a better life for Palestinians and Israelis.”

**🎬****Jared Kushner:** [“This is a very executable plan.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5845dc5f2e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [President Trump Fighting to Fix a Broken Trade System at the G-20](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85b664f762&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
Globalists in Washington and abroad attack President Trump’s trade agenda while ignoring this key fact, Corey Lewandowski writes: “We have a system dominated by nations which engage in all kinds of ways to cheat international trade laws for their own benefit . . . China stands at the forefront of this misbehavior.”
---
|
---
| [Trump Administration’s Industry-Recognized Apprenticeships Will Keep America Working](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1abd66f71&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Miami Herald_
“Through the White House’s Pledge to America’s Workers, job creators around the nation have committed to nearly 10 million training, upskilling or reskilling opportunities for American students and workers,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Labor Secretary Alexander Acosta write. “That is why the Trump administration is proposing a second apprenticeship model: the Industry-Recognized Apprenticeship.”

**Watch:** [A message from Ivanka Trump at the G20 Summit](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=698e38e05c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [USMCA Will Unleash American Innovation: Dems Must Not Stand in the Way](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=51472cd172&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi told reporters this week that the pending U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) would need to be reopened and tweaked before the House will vote on it. This is bad news for America,” Rep. Ron Estes (R-KS) writes. “Mexico earlier this month made a monumental step forward in becoming the first country to ratify the deal. With Canada not far behind, it is past time for Pelosi to allow the USMCA to move forward in Congress.”
---
|
---
| [I am a Former Prisoner. Here's Why Second Chance Hiring is So Important.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fb85e49a8&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“This month, the Trump administration served as a catalyst for perhaps the largest criminal justice public-private-partnership ever assembled, jobs for formerly incarcerated people as they reenter society,” John Koufos writes. “As a former prisoner myself, this initiative is personal to me . . . [President Trump] understands this challenge.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7f5e43c3b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ede2333b63&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8bc4c5db52)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Did you see my email? ⚠️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
You're no stranger to End of Quarter deadlines for political campaigns. It’s pretty simple. Every three months, I'm required to report the exact.....
Friend,

You're no stranger to End of Quarter deadlines for political campaigns. It’s pretty simple. Every three months, I'm required to report the exact dollar amount I've raised. That number is made public for anyone and everyone to see -- a quantification of my grassroots support.

It's always important to report strong numbers to prove our momentum to the Democrats and the media, especially if you are a political outsider who hasn’t spent years in office building a fundraising list.

Because I’ve never run before, this deadline is critical.

I need you to help me reach my goal.
****[END OF QUARTER CONTRIBUTION](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4d461586490a41f49b1e70b843fafc97&_e=xAKSUZofueN3fEBdnN3GhcMt6LBFlHiUezJCWg1-kuh2wpuFDvqF_Q085bx-GoXtDR9xzIrmmvt7-Wo1Cx1GWr0HptnHfAeS7C86GIxw-Vy2-xdgHaRCSXxPUEdkjr_xQrvoxdaQdzxlrBUqQO4MP7fQ8R1cyr4mJ0Q4_l2SbHD-iG9JL0KIdc6uriVScFuuX2cyHhO9DqTCdQUSBwzuo4nH-Ee8ABA8ImtCaczZHwNZFmlm3HKhd9uAvY7PZaVATrRnoyLPE3ChRKINxfZV1OzH4JNyGhjE8e2PaHhpo2ltXTT3HiN45Z6XlvSUnnQP3ViTCwLLH5GG6hzOVVbSwUa1JCjiCeQ_6FTf1TQpCuy2pEu2y_-npSTB92oeTLoR2WEhM8KVoKu2dfW3LvvbOqmVDJ-CjFmPBzzI8xUk4oBW5elcjE5ymYXBVDZ7zvbD)****
---

This is going to be an extremely costly race. Lizzie Fletcher and her DC backers think they can buy this seat. [**That's why I'm relying on you to do your part and chip in.**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4d461586490a41f49b1e70b843fafc97&_e=xAKSUZofueN3fEBdnN3GhcMt6LBFlHiUezJCWg1-kuh2wpuFDvqF_Q085bx-GoXtDR9xzIrmmvt7-Wo1Cx1GWr0HptnHfAeS7C86GIxw-Vy2-xdgHaRCSXxPUEdkjr_xQrvoxdaQdzxlrBUqQO4MP7fQ8R1cyr4mJ0Q4_l2SbHD-iG9JL0KIdc6uriVScFuumxLFgtUt_oZ8LFg_cGv7lT9Uuyvg5qzK4pSbQ-_H8uZRtStIoC05ZvAsFA_KfTDI7PQFgRdSXIX0tOiYl8LINYQVt4A0YuO7uVjsACryL5AVuRiNiOtokgZOpuwUrDHwDvEe8LiaZWia8rS1MBPP7S9rX61sLIvb1l0ajUL6-a_q5if1sjX0Z182PYnKNrS6jQfqZIFrDYX5I6Mjx_Dm76ROTO_lDQ57l85VwdvhQuU28lvQ_UWGzcndja9eYamc)

Not only will Lizzie Fletcher be watching, but so will Nancy Pelosi and the Washington Democrats.

I’ve always stood up and fought our nation. [**Now, I need you to stand with me friend.**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4d461586490a41f49b1e70b843fafc97&_e=xAKSUZofueN3fEBdnN3GhcMt6LBFlHiUezJCWg1-kuh2wpuFDvqF_Q085bx-GoXtDR9xzIrmmvt7-Wo1Cx1GWr0HptnHfAeS7C86GIxw-Vy2-xdgHaRCSXxPUEdkjr_xQrvoxdaQdzxlrBUqQO4MP7fQ8R1cyr4mJ0Q4_l2SbHD-iG9JL0KIdc6uriVScFuubU0iSz-PXJV_H-GJxIlEXd7C9peAagxxoLj8zMtjWkpN-GeM2A5UcW7L9Tw7c8-TzCKE1iGTt_MNuQPGMnEyw5Du_gziZKk1CRyhtY6RLNnjZaFyK3Ho4qbKBkY_8o6BcyV-5fuMflN1Ki8rw8snkaIEHC00Tv0hfJLmoeDnVBwXtErD8p1MZ3yuX_rncDPDlbDbDGWDwUmYNUonL-mRnQwAmUlc7FSBqG6gg3p_aIb2Lgl2a3rs7PEjoLG-gbYE)
****[CHIP IN](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4d461586490a41f49b1e70b843fafc97&_e=xAKSUZofueN3fEBdnN3GhcMt6LBFlHiUezJCWg1-kuh2wpuFDvqF_Q085bx-GoXtDR9xzIrmmvt7-Wo1Cx1GWr0HptnHfAeS7C86GIxw-Vy2-xdgHaRCSXxPUEdkjr_xQrvoxdaQdzxlrBUqQO4MP7fQ8R1cyr4mJ0Q4_l2SbHD-iG9JL0KIdc6uriVScFuu-jTdguW5Y2bFp-fPGbVigqehPcVVzT-WtTsRxPWMIUkiGlQrvgjOe4Z6itIYBLr-O1p8CN8Dc25UrrzI-iOfGNXvYoKoFbXyDQjSKS26N-kT-lVUBzlQXmeVP5AkOXOoxth2omoQwrdavDPCcEPgfzG5O76ba0r69b6oF_2K3XALKcoHl8sNb2nUkKeDqJOfIyrnTQH8GLZD_gpnxf-pwyPUgSYvKfG5fPpuqEn-oAKwXLi9oJ1XJK67zSY-0ck-)****
---

Thank you, friend. I'm counting on you.

Wesley Hunt

\-----Forwarded Message Below-----

Friend,

We live in the greatest country that has ever graced the earth. **We need leaders in Congress who act like it.**

My years in the military taught me that when you believe in something...** _YOU DEFEND IT_. **I believe in the values that make us great: **_Duty_. _Honor_. _Country_.**

[**I’m running for the honor of representing my friends, family and neighbors in “The People’s House” and with your help, I’ll win.**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4d461586490a41f49b1e70b843fafc97&_e=xAKSUZofueN3fEBdnN3GhcMt6LBFlHiUezJCWg1-kuh2wpuFDvqF_Q085bx-GoXtDR9xzIrmmvt7-Wo1Cx1GWr0HptnHfAeS7C86GIxw-Vy2-xdgHaRCSXxPUEdkjr_xQrvoxdaQdzxlrBUqQO4MP7fQ8R1cyr4mJ0Q4_l2SbHD-iG9JL0KIdc6uriVScFuu7mYjDsAd7jA85M9ALPoou10lwaLfRIpDSQ4K5HDrsBFxzBnf0u75EIabzLLc6U2Wdi8NtpzuUhq60xo93PwPhd9l_MhlXERlKa47gFDAg8UEvxBkgna28HnmDYDU76yqPdGry4K0BeTumDQ9zFTCXUoFEzB7ALqVOFS4uEqvz4dMHuSmuxLYFqL-dj97VnduAdIRY62MSYtsU33v5W4cw5jFweR4YnCP7h34zXOP9Y6W2qTLho_G9ggvxDGtGQo-)

I’m a native Houstonian, born and raised. My father served in the Army. With that kind of role model, it’s not a surprise along with my brother and sister, I am a graduate of West Point.

While flying combat missions in an Apache helicopter over Iraq, I didn’t know whether I would ever return home. But like the millions of veterans who came before me, I believed, as I still do today, that America is worth fighting for.

Right now, we have the fewest veterans in Congress since World War II. Instead of securing our border, strengthening our economy, putting our fiscal house in order and working with President Trump, the career politicians play partisan games, scream and bicker and serve themselves.

I learned in the Army that your word is your bond. That’s a stark contrast to the all talk no action politicians in DC.

Our opponent is Liberal Democrat Lizzie Fletcher. She eked out a victory in 2018 by promising to be independent. **She pledged to stand up to Nancy Pelosi. But her first vote in Congress was to elect Nancy Pelosi Speaker of the House.** And she’s voted in lockstep with Nancy Pelosi ever since, jettisoning our Houston values in favor of Pelosi’s San Francisco values. Fletcher has voted with Pelosi 100% of the time.

[**I’m going to defeat Lizzie Fletcher, but I need your help.**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4d461586490a41f49b1e70b843fafc97&_e=xAKSUZofueN3fEBdnN3GhcMt6LBFlHiUezJCWg1-kuh2wpuFDvqF_Q085bx-GoXtDR9xzIrmmvt7-Wo1Cx1GWr0HptnHfAeS7C86GIxw-Vy2-xdgHaRCSXxPUEdkjr_xQrvoxdaQdzxlrBUqQO4MP7fQ8R1cyr4mJ0Q4_l2SbHD-iG9JL0KIdc6uriVScFuupz0UzquttjCVoPeNRp0SUX3g9xSSck-62aCDNOVurwftFvKFTj-3P_GxK2ZUFKTVu3LEiZIxVdjbQQsa8cvwORBmMFi_ZummRm4L9ktHkSxQfSgckzwkoUMNNguIvOcN3SoTLs5fGLIQVi_pdRKf8svYg5QhnmCRqoh2s8CKnKFIweG9FPX6c-SGP4hkIg1ZkSQnJbUuLi_nuoU8BJMv-8YbbvigFccwqF6M9KEUDIwuMEB-ORV9wft2uAC8FGYx)

In just 72 hours, we face our first critical fundraising deadline. Everyone will be watching—but especially our opponents.
****[END OF QUARTER CONTRIBUTION](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4d461586490a41f49b1e70b843fafc97&_e=xAKSUZofueN3fEBdnN3GhcMt6LBFlHiUezJCWg1-kuh2wpuFDvqF_Q085bx-GoXtDR9xzIrmmvt7-Wo1Cx1GWr0HptnHfAeS7C86GIxw-Vy2-xdgHaRCSXxPUEdkjr_xQrvoxdaQdzxlrBUqQO4MP7fQ8R1cyr4mJ0Q4_l2SbHD-iG9JL0KIdc6uriVScFuuJKCailRhPx2_17nKMs1YpT7_bTn04uxKgn7Y-djvqs6OQR4P7U2gMtcN0msRN3sTMw19c7NZSeXsgVb51mq0MO6iP74VlqsynmiXQ2USP5ywDCHglPKye9oFWMEeyQomKOmj4g429aBVTHcspNZAON09Ohu7j9ntI60k_--WTMLbiibjn0WERGGPh6sPlKPd5Oc1FL3Vncv_kGA9UvWRaKuQfSAMjPCpUj79t3i_AXoCNOiTkin4nKNI9yRVher0)****
---
I need your help to raise another $20,000 by midnight on June 30th. [**Your grassroots contribution of $250, $100, $75, $50 or $25 will get us there.**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4d461586490a41f49b1e70b843fafc97&_e=xAKSUZofueN3fEBdnN3GhcMt6LBFlHiUezJCWg1-kuh2wpuFDvqF_Q085bx-GoXtDR9xzIrmmvt7-Wo1Cx1GWr0HptnHfAeS7C86GIxw-Vy2-xdgHaRCSXxPUEdkjr_xQrvoxdaQdzxlrBUqQO4MP7fQ8R1cyr4mJ0Q4_l2SbHD-iG9JL0KIdc6uriVScFuuCDiN0kopzfy9o2NWL-xyU2LUzaQOLTwlW6oRyNAOJhPgRF-Oh4vBjUMcNbeVqPsN5b_ouTU6HdHkPZDB9BLFcjLnzL438zJ2TgQ-umRlBWpxtIUZ-DnbuQeNbagvKWkgcE0K-3DIoCk1cFuwhAZxxerOuC9oHByafCLzBgYKRTveRGN76yET2FvFawnfUjCKcPkH337VQCjpJiI_J9PQPR3imhX82MAGS9pya-FPUTecbxQO4NBrXhSKQctb6TSU)

That’s our mission. Will you help me accomplish it?

God Bless Texas and America,

Wesley Hunt

P.S. **_DUTY_. _HONOR_. _COUNTRY_. **Those three words guided me in battle and they will be my north star as your Republican Representative in Congress. [**Standing together, and fighting shoulder-to-shoulder, I know we’ll win. **](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4d461586490a41f49b1e70b843fafc97&_e=xAKSUZofueN3fEBdnN3GhcMt6LBFlHiUezJCWg1-kuh2wpuFDvqF_Q085bx-GoXtDR9xzIrmmvt7-Wo1Cx1GWr0HptnHfAeS7C86GIxw-Vy2-xdgHaRCSXxPUEdkjr_xQrvoxdaQdzxlrBUqQO4MP7fQ8R1cyr4mJ0Q4_l2SbHD-iG9JL0KIdc6uriVScFuui9Kcv7m6R0kgCEn0bmPmZAf47mHmxLQj-p196IRNXOvIE5PZEgJRawK7wozao-xu5M1qoegMNimZT81E7fkXYZ3y8lLSUDhitWqsVtbWQbC6Aook1-L4AqFYglTfhsRO3o1ITMQlxyZK8Fz8WPIfIP0bjyKbljhmftNGz6TtnVLo3uOU8V7keE_kAYz8jJNDi-V0pg0nqOhbsPy9DlHzxJH16XkghHc48YHWuPHE4-3s9cVvzMMzaL5qRA31FE5W)

Friend, You're no stranger to End of Quarter deadlines for political campaigns. It’s pretty simple. Every three months, I'm required to report the exact dollar amount I've raised. That number is made public for anyone and everyone to see -- a quantification of my grassroots support. It's always important to report strong numbers to prove our momentum to the Democrats and the media, especially if you are a political outsider who hasn’t spent years in office building a fundraising list. Because I’ve never run before, this deadline is critical. I need you to help me reach my goal. ** This is going to be an extremely costly race. Lizzie Fletcher and her DC backers think they can buy this seat. Not only will Lizzie Fletcher be watching, but so will Nancy Pelosi and the Washington Democrats. I’ve always stood up and fought our nation. - Thank you, friend. I'm counting on you. subject: Add your name to the list?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaTurner for Senate
body:
We need your help sending a message to Democrats, the liberal media, and the Washington DC establishment. | | |
---
| | Jake has been working non-stop since this campaign began in January and his message is resonating with Kansans.

June 30th is tomorrow. Why does that matter? It's the end of the quarter and everyone will gauge the strength of our campaign based on Jake's fundraising report.

_**We need your help sending a message to Democrats, the liberal media, and the Washington DC establishment.**_

Jake is a conservative fighter who truly understands and reflects Kansas values. We need someone to stand up to Washington DC and show them that Kansans want a US Senator who will protect our Kansas values.

[When we report our fundraising numbers, we want your name on that list. Can you contribute $25, $50, $100, or even $500?](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=aec93053e2&e=6882b657f8)[ Anything helps. ](https://laturnerforsenate.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=66e1e33aabb963218c502c41e&id=77215e3f6f&e=6882b657f8) It’s time for Kansas to send a conservative fighter to Washington D.C.

Yours in the fight -
Team LaTurner

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
#
I’ll make this quick. I'm so grateful to all of you who have made a contribution at the end of a big week and at the close of this important quarter.
People want to know how this campaign is going, and if they too should step up to support us. When you make a contribution (or, as is the case so often, an additional contribution), it really helps them see how possible what we’re all doing is, that their support can make the difference, and that they'll find themselves in good company.
From the beginning, we said we wouldn’t take PAC money. We said no to the corporations. We closed the doors on the lobbyists. And we said we aren't interested in what the special interests have to say. Instead we are 100% focused on people and the things we can do together to make our lives better. It's the best way to run, and I believe the best way to win.
[We are trying to reach a goal of $600,000. Can I count on your continued support before our FEC deadline at midnight tomorrow? Even if you can only give a little bit, it all adds up.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18000?refcode=ema20190629-39481&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=39481%2E444211%2EjCo5Es)
Thank you.
Sincerely,
Beto O'Rourke
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18000?refcode=ema20190629-39481&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=39481%2E444211%2EjCo5Es)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=39481%2E444211%2EjCo5Es). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Dan Baer
subject: I promise this email will be quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
MSNBC just named my Republican opponent the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country.
|
---

| | I know you're getting a lot of emails today, so I promise this will be quick: **[I'm asking for $19 before the deadline in 24 hours so I can hit my *first ever* End of Quarter goal of this historic campaign.>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82666/232dfd1/97add2f/62a10089/18358688/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** MSNBC just named my Republican opponent the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country. That means our chances of taking back the Senate rest entirely on Colorado. If we lose my race, we're looking at another two years of obstructionist Mitch McConnell running the Senate. The Supreme Court, health care, tackling climate change, investing in education... it's all on the line. Frankly, the stakes are extraordinarily high. That's why I keep asking for money -- not because I like it, but because we need it to win. _**And because donors like you really can make the difference!**_ So, I'm asking: Can I count on your support with $19 before my first ever End of Quarter deadline so we can win my race, flip the entire Senate, and oust Mitch McConnell? | | [**Donate $19 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82666/232dfd1/97add2f/62a1008e/18358688/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $25 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82666/232dfd1/97add2f/62a1008f/18358688/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $50 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82666/232dfd1/97add2f/62a1008c/18358688/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=50&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $100 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82666/232dfd1/97add2f/62a1008d/18358688/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=100&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate another amount now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82666/232dfd1/97add2f/62a1008f/18358688/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

I know that we are sending a lot of emails. I'm grateful to everyone who has already chipped in (some of you 3, 4, or 5 times!). There are a lot of folks who have shown how much we all care about what's at stake.

Thanks,
Dan

|

name: Team Elisa
subject: #CloseTheCamps protest with Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7900111/75389279/979390018?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjAxOWVmMi1hYzlhLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtOlw6IThcdyvxtZ9S-7YaeLn6G3-ImPO5nc_5T-3dM=)
Peter,
Today, Team Elisa took some time out of our end-of-quarter fundraising efforts to protest the Southwest Key Juvenile Detention Center right here in Houston. This was yet another reminder of how much is at stake in 2020 when voters like you take to the polls.
We were grateful to be joined by Beto O’Rourke and hundreds of engaged members of our community to stand up for these children.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7900112/75389280/-1594214468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjAxOWVmMi1hYzlhLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtOlw6IThcdyvxtZ9S-7YaeLn6G3-ImPO5nc_5T-3dM=&refcode=email)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes?=
subject: Victory For U.S. Farmers - Trump G20 Negotiation
body:
| | | |
---
|
**U.S. Farmers WIN Victory Through President Trump's Negotiation with China During G20 Summit**
---
| | |
---
|
### President Trump and China's ceasefire is victory for American Farmers.
President Trump and China's General Secretary, Xi Jinping, negotiated a trade war truce during this week's G20 Summit in Japan. President Trump has agreed to delay tariffs on $200 billion worth of Chinese imports - In return China promised to purchase American agricultural, energy, industrial exports and reduce the trade deficit.

American farmers are the biggest winners. We saw our agricultural market dry up as a result of China’s retaliatory tariffs. _**Soybean farmers** **will see much relief from this deal after China agreed to drop their 25 percent tariff.**_

Let's keep President Trump in office four more years. With the President negotiating on our behalf, our now thriving economy stands to become the great economic machine this planet has ever hosted. _**Invest in our President now - see a return on your investment for generations. **_

On To Victory,
Team Trump

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A few things you might not know about Mark:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

We're so fortunate to have Mark Warner fighting for Virginia. In just a second, I'm going to ask you to [**make a donation to his campaign before the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177f/3e0906/78a39c20/3e309b7a/295284044/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-warner&source=20190629_1_FR_TK_Warner&amount=30&refcode=20190629_1_FR_TK_Warner?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+make+a+donation+to+his+campaign+before+t&utm_campaign=20190629_1_FR_TK_Warner&source=20190629_1_FR_TK_Warner"), but first let me share a few things you may not know about Mark.

Mark and I have known each other for a long time -- in fact, we were classmates in law school nearly 40 years ago. When we were running on the same ticket to lead Virginia back in 2001, Democrats holding elected office in Virginia were few and far between. Fast forward to a few weeks ago when Mark and I both had the pleasure of addressing more than 1,800 Virginia Democrats under one roof, and it's just incredible to see the progress this Commonwealth has made.

Today, _every single_ statewide elected official in Virginia, and a majority of our Congressional delegation, are Democrats.

**How did that happen? Because people like Mark Warner have been committed to supporting the grassroots work that really moves the needle.**

From his days as the Chair of the Democratic Party of Virginia to his dedication to hitting the campaign trail for his fellow Democrats, Mark's top priority is and has always been fighting for _all_ of Virginia -- not just places that reliably vote blue.

In 2019 and 2020, that's not going to change. Mark's team is going to be investing in field organizing, digital outreach, and all of the other tools that will help Democrats win all across the Commonwealth over the next two years.

But the fact is, those things aren't cheap. Strong campaigns that talk to every voter take major resources. [**Will you make a donation today to help Democrats win in 2019 and keep Virginia blue in 2020?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177f/3e0906/78a39c20/3e309b79/295284044/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-warner&source=20190629_1_FR_TK_Warner&amount=30&refcode=20190629_1_FR_TK_Warner?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+make+a+donation+today+to+help+D&utm_campaign=20190629_1_FR_TK_Warner&source=20190629_1_FR_TK_Warner")

Thanks so much for your support.

-Tim Kaine

clean_body: | | Derek, We're so fortunate to have Mark Warner fighting for Virginia. In just a second, I'm going to ask you to "", but first let me share a few things you may not know about Mark. Mark and I have known each other for a long time -- in fact, we were classmates in law school nearly 40 years ago. When we were running on the same ticket to lead Virginia back in 2001, Democrats holding elected office in Virginia were few and far between. Fast forward to a few weeks ago when Mark and I both had the pleasure of addressing more than 1,800 Virginia Democrats under one roof, and it's just incredible to see the progress this Commonwealth has made. Today, every single statewide elected official in Virginia, and a majority of our Congressional delegation, are Democrats. How did that happen? Because people like Mark Warner have been committed to supporting the grassroots work that really moves the needle. From his days as the Chair of the Democratic Party of Virginia to his dedication to hitting the campaign trail for his fellow Democrats, Mark's top priority is and has always been fighting for all of Virginia -- not just places that reliably vote blue. In 2019 and 2020, that's not going to change. Mark's team is going to be investing in field organizing, digital outreach, and all of the other tools that will help Democrats win all across the Commonwealth over the next two years. But the fact is, those things aren't cheap. Strong campaigns that talk to every voter take major resources. "" Thanks so much for your support. -Tim Kaine | **** ""** | "" "" ""

body:
I'd walk barefoot to every swing-state if it meant Democrats would defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate and put a check on Trump's power.
---
| | I am a Gold Star father.

I was thrust into the spotlight when Donald Trump insulted me, my loving wife, and our fallen son.

And now, I've committed myself to doing everything possible to stop Donald Trump.

**I 'd walk barefoot to every swing-state if it meant Democrats would defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate and put a check on Trump's power. **But I can't do it alone. I need you with me.

The numbers show we simply can't defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate without a win in New Mexico. But Ben Ray is up against his very first end-of-quarter deadline -- and he still has a $10,040 gap to fill.

So I'm humbly asking: Will you rush in $15 to elect Ben Ray and defeat Mitch McConnell's Republican Senate?

name: M. Zetts
subject: one minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
[](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tr-fec-deadline?amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=automatic&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190629_2_10_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190629_2_10_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190629_2_10_T2")
**Team, if you had to take away just one thing from Wednesday 's debate, it should be this: Tim cares.** He cares about our kids--about their safety, and about making sure schools across the country have the tools and resources they need to foster a safe and welcoming environment.

But Tim's plan to tackle these important issues won't materialize unless we come together and show support--given this, can I take just a minute of your time to explain why this particular fundraising goal is so important?

Tim is working non-stop to ensure he talks to Americans from all walks of life about the issues that matter the most--he isn't attending fancy fundraisers or receiving maximum donations from celebrity donors. That's just not his style.

_**[But, this makes the looming Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline that much more critical. Tim is relying on you and you alone to give him the grassroots strength he needs to continue sharing his vision for the country. Chip in $3 today to ensure Tim has the resources to have a strong showing.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.
