name: Tina Smith
subject: I'm about to fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'll be honest with you:

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend: I will be honest with you.

If more people from this team don't step up, we will fall short. This is not a threat -- this is just fact. **[I'm counting on you, please: Can you pitch in whatever you can so we can close this fundraising gap and enter our summer of organizing strong?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Protecting this Senate seat is so crucial for Democrats -- and I would hate to see us leave any chance about what could happen next.

We've seen attacks from special interest groups, Republicans across Minnesota itching to launch their campaigns against me, and Trump's team draw a big red target on winning this state in 2020.

If we sit back, even for a moment, we will lose in 2020 and put everything we're fighting for -- and all of the progress we've made -- at risk.

**I 'm asking because it's important: Can you please chip in whatever you are able so we can close our fundraising gap and ensure we hold this Senate seat for Democrats? The future of health care, the Supreme Court, and a woman's right to choose is on the line in this race. ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fb9b/c1f7015/62072a01/11476d65/3968925449/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLWp1bmUiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6InJ0d18yMDE5MDYyOV9lbS0yIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190629_em-2-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: [Finance] Team Hickenlooper
subject: Tomorrow will decide our path forward.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
John stood tall on that stage--will you stand with him today and chip in to help us reach our final June fundraising goal by tomorrow? | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771761/691c9bd/6d680022/11a410ba/924060111/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

Since Thursday night, it's been full steam ahead for our campaign.

Millions of Americans watched John on stage in Miami, sharing his vision for an America where health care is a right, climate change is an urgent priority, and immigrants are embraced and welcomed.

**What 's more--John is the only person on the stage who, as both a Mayor and Governor, has actually achieved results on all those fronts.**

But for us to grow this campaign further, we _must_ meet our goals before tomorrow's June FEC reporting deadline. What we raise by tomorrow night will tell us--and the world--whether John truly has the momentum to win this primary and take on Donald Trump.

**John stood tall on that stage --will you stand with him today and chip in to help us reach our final June fundraising goal by tomorrow?** ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper. body:

|

body:

Saturday, I’ll get right to the point: we’re about 24 hours out
from the most important public FEC deadline we’ve faced, and
we’re not where we need to be.

subject: sticking it to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:

| Team,

From day one of Donald Trump's administration, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

Champions like Ed.

✅When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

✅When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

✅And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

name: kamalaharris.org
subject: Own a piece of history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
It’s been an incredible 36 hours. I am so proud to be on this team. The Kamala Harris that millions of Americans saw for the first time on Thursday night is the same one we see every single day in hearings, in closed-door sessions, and in meetings with the team. She holds everyone around her accountable, and challenges them to be at their best every day. And it’s the same joyful warrior that millions of Americans have gotten to know out on the campaign trail. These are qualities that will make her an incredible president -- and the best candidate to beat Donald Trump in November 2020. **I don’t know about you, but after Thursday night, I’m even more fired up to see Kamala prosecute the case against four more years of Donald Trump and this Administration.** Kamala started this campaign by saying she would speak the truth to the American people. That’s what she did this week. And it’s what she’s going to continue to do, no matter who shares the debate stage with her. **With the momentum on our side, now’s our chance to demonstrate that Kamala has the grassroots movement behind her that’s required to win a race this crowded and this competitive. Make a donation -- of any amount -- to Kamala’s campaign for president before our big FEC deadline on Sunday:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190629-eoq?refcode=ema190629-23-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=5480_5755789_8xLgCj&akid=5480%2E5755789%2E8xLgCj)

We wouldn’t be able to run this campaign without you. After all, our path for victory doesn't rely on corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. It relies on you.
Talk soon,
— Lily
Lily Adams
National Communications Director
Kamala 2020

We'll keep organizing -- but our movement won't be as strong as it could be. | | | "" We'll be honest with you: We're falling short of the goal we're trying to hit before tomorrow's FEC deadline. We wouldn 't ask if it weren't urgent: Can Elizabeth count on you to make one of the 158 donations we need from Pennsylvania to get back on track? Chip in right now, and we'll send you a free sticker to say thanks. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Elizabeth is fighting for big, structural change with ideas like the Ultra-Millionaire Tax, Universal Child Care, and cancelling student loan debt. If you want Elizabeth to keep raising important issues and proposing big ideas, then your donation helps keep her on the campaign trail and prevents her voice from being drowned out. Elizabeth doesn 't get big checks from wealthy donors at private fundraisers. She doesn't accept any support from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or Super PACs. This campaign (literally!) wouldn't exist without grassroots donors chipping in. And if we don't hit our goal by midnight tomorrow, we'll feel the consequences. We'll keep organizing -- but our movement won't be as strong as it could be. "" Thanks, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: Team Spanberger
subject: Tomorrow’s fundraising target is ambitious, but so was our plan to win in the 7th District!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
We're inching closer to the final 24 hours of our second quarter, Peter!
| | We're inching closer to the final 24 hours of our second quarter, Peter!

Tomorrow's fundraising target is ambitious, but so was our plan to win in the 7th District!

To ensure we hold the majority in Congress in 2020 and continue making progress for the people of Virginia's 7th and this country, we are working every day to hold Abigail's seat.

Day in and day out, Abigail is giving people across Virginia a voice by fighting for lower health care costs, better infrastructure, safer schools, and an economy that spurs and creates opportunity! From her work on broadband internet infrastructure and prescription drug pricing, to her advocacy for gun violence prevention legislation, she's already made tremendous progress on these initiatives, and she'll keep going until her efforts start showing real impact in our communities and district. **[Peter, it is together that we can meet our ambitious goals -- in fundraising and in holding this seat! Please consider helping us with a contribution!](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MWMOJukDoZhAmqPbAgX5fLhAxbXf9hUO5xT9Aqgf7w=/z1poAX6w0cPw-Mu-4zR7vc-wLR24tB2gMbbmpri4rxU=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b2_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)** | [$10 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MWMOJukDoZhAmqPbAgX5fLhAxbXf9hUO5xT9Aqgf7w=/z1poAX6w0cPw-Mu-4zR7vc-wLR24tB2gMbbmpri4rxU=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b2_ts_all&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) | [$25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/2MWMOJukDoZhAmqPbAgX5fLhAxbXf9hUO5xT9Aqgf7w=/z1poAX6w0cPw-Mu-4zR7vc-wLR24tB2gMbbmpri4rxU=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.29_b2_ts_all&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I need a favor:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b528/18e32a7f/56293731/7ba3bc97/1970807224/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b3_haaland_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
---
I have a critical favor to ask:

[**_I 'm asking you to chip in $15 before my friend Ben Ray Lujan's first end-of-quarter deadline. New Mexicans and I are banding together to raise $50,000 before midnight to ensure Ben Ray wins his critical Senate race and ousts Mitch McConnell. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b528/18e32a7f/56293731/7ba3bc97/1970807224/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b3_haaland_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

I've known Ben Ray for a long time, so believe me when I tell you he's a fighter.

I watched him lead the fight to take back the House for Democrats and the American people.

I watched him fight to bring justice and equality to all people through his platform as Assistant Speaker of the U.S. House and the highest-ranking Hispanic in Congress.

And I watched him fight to pave the way for candidates like me to become one of the first Native American women in Congress.

**I know he 's our best chance to win the Senate, too -- that's why New Mexicans and I are joining forces today to help Ben Ray have a massive fundraising day.**

Look, this race is the most competitive open Senate seat in the country.

So I'll be honest: If we don't put everything we have into winning here in New Mexico, it will be very difficult to defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate nationwide.

Ben Ray's facing his very first end-of-quarter deadline, and I want to give him every resource he needs to beat back Republicans' attacks and win.

**[_It would mean so much to me if you 'd chip in $15 and help me raise $50,000 for Ben Ray's monumental Senate race before midnight. >> _](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b528/18e32a7f/56293731/7ba3bc97/1970807224/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b3_haaland_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")**

Thank you,

Deb Haaland

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b528/18e32a7f/56293731/7ba3bc94/1970807224/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b528/18e32a7f/56293731/7ba3bc95/1970807224/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b528/18e32a7f/56293731/7ba3bc8a/1970807224/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b528/18e32a7f/56293731/7ba3bc8b/1970807224/VEsB/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")

name: James Mackler
subject: a lot of emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
You've heard it all, so I won't waste any more of your Saturday:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa25b/18d6a294/4bb482b7/26d679b8/2945770116/VEsH/ "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | | | FEC DEADLINE TOMORROW | | | [Chip in now](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa25b/18d6a294/4bb482b7/26d679b9/2945770116/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190629amnd?refcode=jme190629amnd_m&recurring=true")
---
I know, I know -- you've received a lot of emails from my team this month:
* You've heard from **Gov. Phil Bredesen, Sen. Jacky Rosen** and **Sen. Tim Kaine** , who endorsed me for the Senate.
* You've heard how my race will help **decide control of the Senate.**
* You've heard why I'm **not accepting money from corporate PACs.**
* You've heard about an **extremist Republican opponent** and how more are considering entering the race.
* You've heard about our **FEC deadline** at the end of the month when our numbers go public.

You've heard it all, so I won't waste any more of your Saturday:
[_**Will you contribute to help reach our FEC goal before midnight tomorrow?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa25b/18d6a294/4bb482b7/26d679b9/2945770116/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190629amnd?refcode=jme190629amnd_m&recurring=true")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: important (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | This is a long email. I really need you to read the entire thing -- [**and then consider donating $19 to my campaign before tomorrow 's Federal End of Quarter Deadline. >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac306/2387097887/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") At the debates, my message resonated with America. I know why. My life hasn't always been easy, and I know yours hasn't either. I understand the struggle real people in this country face. I watched my grandmother clean other people's houses for a living. She never got passed the 4th grade. She came here from Mexico when she was seven, rolled up her sleeves, and worked 20-hour days to give us a better life. My mom was a single mom. She experienced first-hand that gut-wrenching feeling of not being able to put food on the table when my brother and I were little. I felt guilty when I got sick because it meant that my family would be crushed under bills from the doctor. I know what it feels like to be from an immigrant family, in a neighborhood that doesn't have much privilege. I grew up in one. **Here is the bottom line -- I get it because I 've lived it: ** I know how much equal pay would have meant for my mom -- that's why I stood up for it at the debates this week. I see my grandmother in the images of the babies separated from their parents at the border -- that's why I stood up for a humane immigration plan. I see my childhood neighborhood when I go to Flint, Michigan and hear about kids living without drinking water -- that's why I'm standing up for lead policy. I see my son and daughter in the faces of children with no access to quality education -- that's why I'm fighting for universal pre-K for all. I promise you this: I will always -- always -- fight for you. And I need you to fight for me today. If you want to keep me in this race, to see me at the next debates, and to help me build a sustainable campaign that's in it for the long haul, I need you right now. My Federal End of Quarter Deadline is in 24 hours, and it's a critically important moment for me. Would you please consider rushing in $19 to support me? | | [**Chip in $8 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac305/2387097887/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=8")
---

[**Chip in $19 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac304/2387097887/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=19")
---

[**Chip in $37 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac303/2387097887/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=37")
---

[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac302/2387097887/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=50")
---

[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac306/2387097887/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")
---

Thank you,

Julian Castro

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac301/2387097887/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac300/2387097887/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac30f/2387097887/VEsP/ "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac30e/2387097887/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac30d/2387097887/VEsHBA/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdab/3eb3e2fc/45702778/744ac30c/2387097887/VEsHBw/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

My Federal End of Quarter Deadline is in 24 hours, and it's a critically important moment for me. Would you please consider rushing in $19 to support me? | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Julian Castro | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage. Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?q?Jen_O=E2=80=99Malley_Dillon=2C_Beto_for_America?=
subject: Not how Beto operates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Most candidates will be spending every last hour before this deadline on the phones, calling big donors to ask for money. That’s not how Beto operates.
#
Hi — Beto’s campaign manager here.
It’s the end of the quarter. I know you’re getting a lot of emails. This deadline is important for us — and every campaign. I’m working every minute to make sure we hit our $600,000 goal. But while I keep my eyes on our numbers, I want you to know how Beto is spending these final hours.
Most candidates will be spending every last hour before this deadline on the phones, calling big donors to ask for money. That’s not how Beto operates.

Instead, Beto is organizing a major rally at the Clint Border Patrol station to demand justice for immigrant children detained in cruel, inhumane conditions. He’s kicking off a canvass so people know their rights in case of ICE raids.

This is exactly the kind of leadership we need to see matched up against Trump in 2020. We’re taking the fight right to him. And that’s why meeting this goal is so critical:

[We’ve only got until tomorrow at midnight. Can you add a $3 contribution to help us reach our goal? Every donation builds our strength as we head into the most critical time of our campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18008?refcode=ema20190629-39534&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=39534%2E444211%2Ed9NFcq)
As Trump continues to sow chaos at the border, Beto will stay focused on defining the path forward — not trying to score political points.
I’m proud every day to work for Beto, and he’s showing everyone why. He will _always_ work for people — for families who arrived in this country yesterday and for those who’ve been here for decades — to help solve the most important issues of our time.
Thank you for being in this together,
Jen O’Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18008?refcode=ema20190629-39534&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=39534%2E444211%2Ed9NFcq)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=39534%2E444211%2Ed9NFcq). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020

John stood tall on that stage--will you stand with him today and chip in to help us reach our final June fundraising goal by tomorrow? | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771760/691c9bd/6d6c6254/11a4104a/894572971/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")

| Friend,

Since Thursday night, it's been full steam ahead for our campaign.

Millions of Americans watched John on stage in Miami, sharing his vision for an America where health care is a right, climate change is an urgent priority, and immigrants are embraced and welcomed.

**What 's more--John is the only person on the stage who, as both a Mayor and Governor, has actually achieved results on all those fronts.**

But for us to grow this campaign further, we _must_ meet our goals before tomorrow's June FEC reporting deadline. What we raise by tomorrow night will tell us--and the world--whether John truly has the momentum to win this primary and take on Donald Trump.

name: URGENT@EdMarkey.com
subject: YIKES(!!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| | |
No no no, team. We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

name: Ted Lieu
subject: McConnell's doomed
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I only reach out when it's important, so hear me out: [**_Top Democrats and I are banding together today to raise Ben Ray $50,000. If we succeed, he 'll have the resources to WIN his Senate race and finally kick Mitch McConnell out of office. Can you kick in $15 by midnight? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b529/18e32a7f/563a20ec/7ba387b5/1358089100/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b4_lieu_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") I stood by Ben Ray's side as he led the charge to do what so many thought impossible -- take back the House. So trust me: Now that he's running for Senate -- _**Mitch McConnell should be absolutely terrified.**_ Want proof? Since Ben Ray launched his race for Senate: \-- Mitch's approval rating completely plummeted \-- He's now in danger of losing the seat he's held for decades \-- And Democrats have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat McConnell and flip the ENTIRE Senate Republicans are flooding New Mexico with cash because they know if Ben Ray wins, they're completely doomed. It's music to my ears. I'm proud to stand by Ben Ray's side once again as he runs for New Mexico Senate, because I know he's our best shot to win the whole dang thing. _**[His very first end-of-quarter deadline is in 24 hours, and I 'm not leaving until he has every last penny he needs to pull this off. Will you chip in, help us reach $50,000 for Ben Ray, and join Democrats in making history today? >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b529/18e32a7f/563a20ec/7ba387b5/1358089100/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190629_em_fr_b4_lieu_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")**_ Thank you, Ted Lieu
---
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b529/18e32a7f/563a20ec/7ba387aa/1358089100/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b529/18e32a7f/563a20ec/7ba387ab/1358089100/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b529/18e32a7f/563a20ec/7ba387a8/1358089100/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")

| Team,

The team and I wanted to send a quick note to say thank you for all of your support and encouragement after the first Democratic debate.

It was a unique opportunity for Michael to speak directly to millions of Americans who, like us, are deeply concerned about our country's future.

Over the past two years, Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have made it impossible to get anything positive accomplished.

[**Team, Michael is running for president to reform our government and fix our broken politics so we can get things done. All contributions are being matched until MIDNIGHT tomorrow. Will you rush a donation right now and double your impact?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadf6/134673f2/8fb054/6996baed/2910645766/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
